title: Saskatoon Berry Pilaf with Caramelized Croation Spring Onions
description: A savory and sweet pilaf dish featuring caramelized croatian spring onions and juicy saskatoon berries.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the sliced spring onions and cook for 10-12 minutes, or until caramelized.
Add the pilaf mix to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until lightly toasted.
Add the saskatoon berries to the skillet and stir to combine with the pilaf and spring onions.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the pilaf mixture to a serving dish and garnish with chopped parsley, if desired.
